ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Retrieve protein information from the 'UniProtKB' REST API (see <https://www.uniprot.org/help/api_queries>).
Retrieve protein information from the 'UniProtKB' REST API (see <https://www.uniprot.org/help/api_queries>).

name: r-queryup
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '1.0.5' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-queryup
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/queryup_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/queryup/queryup_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 06891ab0eafda8e8c3cf2e5dd466145338b973b7bb3e1c7a5c129f1af40e8366

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-httr
    - r-jsonlite
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-httr
    - r-jsonlite

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('queryup')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('queryup')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://github.com/VoisinneG/queryup
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  summary: Retrieve protein information from the 'UniProtKB' REST API (see <https://www.uniprot.org/help/api_queries>).
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: queryup
# Type: Package
# Title: Query the 'UniProtKB' REST API
# Version: 1.0.5
# Authors@R: person("Guillaume", "Voisinne", , "voisinne@gmail.com", role = c("aut", "cre"), comment = c(ORCID = "0000-0003-3922-2121"))
# Maintainer: Guillaume Voisinne <voisinne@gmail.com>
# Description: Retrieve protein information from the 'UniProtKB' REST API (see <https://www.uniprot.org/help/api_queries>).

# BugReports: https://github.com/VoisinneG/queryup/issues

# Imports: httr, jsonlite, utils
# Suggests: covr, knitr, xml2, rmarkdown, testthat (>= 3.0.0)
# Config/testthat/edition: 3
